transcript.speaker: Maya Patel
transcript.text: Before we build this, I want to sanity check: has anyone seen anything like this in the market already?

transcript.speaker: Jordan Smith
transcript.text: Good call. We should do a quick prior art sweep, focus on productized meeting copilots with local-first guarantees.

transcript.speaker: Alex Chen
transcript.text: Especially ones that run agents locally. Let's scope to the last 18 months.

transcript.speaker: Riley Johnson
transcript.text: And include open source plus YC companies. Budget eight minutes?

transcript.speaker: Maya Patel
transcript.text: Perfect. Please capture the reasoning and key differentiators.
